Bomb.description: Bomb is the plant/defuse/explode outcome for a round.

opponents.description: the N in 1vN, measured when the clutch began

saved.description: round lost but the clutcher lived

Clutch.description: Clutch is a 1vN where the player is last alive on their side.

saved.description: lost the round but the clutcher lived

ClutchStats.description: ClutchStats sums up a player's clutch outcomes.

shots.description: rifle shots measured, enemy in vision, not crouched

stopped.description: of those, fired under the accuracy speed cap

avg_speed.description: avg horizontal speed when firing, u/s

CounterStrafe.description: CounterStrafe measures how stopped a player was when firing.

health_damage.description: capped at the victim's remaining HP

damage_type.description: bullet / he / fire / knife / taser / bomb / world / other

DroppedWeapon.description: DroppedWeapon is one gun lying in the world at a phase boundary.

damage.description: health damage killer dealt to victim

time_to_damage_ms.description: avg ms seeing to first damage, needs a map mesh

Duel.description: Duel is one killer's record against one victim over the whole match.

FlashPair.description: FlashPair holds how often and how long a flasher blinded one victim.

FlashedPlayer.description: FlashedPlayer is one player blinded by a flashbang, with how long.

GrenadeBasic.description: GrenadeBasic is one thrown smoke or decoy.

GrenadeHE.description: GrenadeHE is one thrown HE grenade.

damage_dealt.description: total HP fire damage to ENEMIES

team_damage.description: total HP fire damage to TEAMMATES

GrenadeMolotov.description: GrenadeMolotov is one thrown molotov or incendiary.

GrenadePath.description: GrenadePath is one grenade's flight trajectory plus bounce points.

side.description: victim side CT/T at this round

GrenadeVictim.description: GrenadeVictim is one player damaged by an HE detonation or molotov inferno.

Grenades.description: Grenades holds the typed per-round grenade buckets.

InventoryChange.description: InventoryChange is one snapshot at a phase where inventory actually changed: a change log, not a per-tick dump.

steam_id.description: matches the steam_id string convention used across the model

round.description: 1-based round in progress at the event

LifecycleEvent.description: LifecycleEvent is one connection/bot transition for a playing-team player.

Loadout.description: Loadout is the freeze-time-end inventory snapshot for one round-player, grouped and counted.

LoadoutItem.description: LoadoutItem is one grouped grenade or equipment item in a loadout.

LoadoutWeapon.description: LoadoutWeapon is one grouped gun in a loadout or inventory change.

duel_pairs.description: whole-match head-to-head pairs/edge list with per-pair TTD

match_lifecycle.description:
match-level connect/disconnect/bot-takeover log, playing-team players only,
sorted by time at finalize for determinism.

server_platform.description: best guess: valve / esl / esea / faceit / ... / unknown

game_mode.description: competitive / premier / wingman / ... valve demos only, often empty

workshop_id.description: addon id, empty for official maps

traded.description: victim was traded inside the trade window

OpeningDuel.description: OpeningDuel is a round's first kill.

attempts.description: opening duels taken part in, kill or death

OpeningStats.description: OpeningStats sums up a player's opening-duel involvement.

map_mesh_loaded.description: were geometric LOS aim stats computable

OutputMeta.description: OutputMeta is the self-describing fidelity descriptor: the tier and the set of populated detail streams.

exit_kills.description: after the round was decided, kept out of K/D

spotted_accuracy_pct.description: The omitempty fields below need a map mesh for line of sight and are dropped when none is loaded.

spray_accuracy_pct.description: share of spray bullets that hit

time_to_damage_ms.description: avg ms, seeing an enemy to first damage

crosshair_placement.description: median deg moved from sighting to hit

knife_kills.description: kill-type counters. chicken_kills is player-total only (no chicken victim per round).

picked_up_kills.description: kills made with a picked-up gun

rank.description: Valve comp/premier rank. only set for Valve MM demos, 0 otherwise.

spray_patterns.description: recoil-pattern deviation, one per weapon variant

opening_overall.description: Opening duels (first kill of each round), split by side

clutch_overall.description: Clutches (last alive on their side vs N enemies), split by side

is_walking.description: cheap per-frame state. ride only on the positions frame, not on kills.

PlayerFrame.description: PlayerFrame is one player's sampled position and state at a single frame.

post_round_microseconds.description: round end to next freeze, the exit window

kills.description: live-round kill timeline, enriched with duel semantics

bomb.description: nil unless the bomb was planted

streams.description: Heavy opt-in detail. set only when at least one stream is on.

killer_speed.description: killer horizontal speed at the kill, u/s, derived

killer_speed_ratio.description: speed / weapon max move speed. lower is better

traded.description: death traded within 4s by a teammate

traded_by.description: the teammate who traded this death

possible_traders.description: teammates alive and in a position to trade

picked_up.description: kill-weapon was picked up: original_owner != killer

killer_scoped.description: killer was scoped at the kill

knife_kills.description: per-round kill-type counters. NO chicken_kills here (chickens are player-total only).

picked_up_kills.description: kills made with a picked-up gun

start_money.description:
Economy. EquipmentValue is captured at buy-window close, capped at death (was
freeze-time-end). Loadout stays the freeze-time-end item snapshot.

equipment_value.description: value at buy-window close, capped at death (was freeze-time-end)

is_connected.description: per-round connection state, captured at freeze-end.

is_controlling_bot.description: human driving a bot this round

opening_death_traded.description: lost the opener and got traded

clutch.description: set only if this player clutched

RoundPlayer.description: RoundPlayer is one player's contribution in a single round.

RoundStreams.description: RoundStreams is the opt-in heavy detail for a round.

team_a_name.description: Clan/team names if the demo carries them. empty in matchmaking/pugs.

recoil_index.description: engine recoil index: shot number into the current spray. map against the shipped spray_patterns instead of reimplementing recoil math

Shot.description: Shot is one weapon-fire event plus the shooter's geometry.

ShotStat.description: ShotStat is the core-tier per-player-per-weapon shot aggregate, so stat consumers lose nothing when the per-shot stream is off.

SprayBullet.description: SprayBullet compares, at a given shot index, the ideal aim offset that cancels the recoil pattern (ideal) against what the player actually did (actual).

scoped.description: fired while scoped in (AUG/SG553 have a scoped pattern)

silencer_on.description: silencer attached (M4A1-S has a no-silencer pattern)

avg_deviation.description: mean deg off from ideal recoil compensation

SprayDeviation.description: SprayDeviation holds how a player's sprays with one weapon matched its recoil pattern, averaged over every 3+ shot spray they fired.

UtilityAverages.description: UtilityAverages holds a player's match-level utility averages.

flashes_leading_to_kill.description: enemy killed by thrower's team while fully blind from this flash

enemy_blind_microseconds.description: total blind time put on enemies

unused_utility_value.description: $ of util still in hand at death, summed over deaths

WeaponPickup.description: WeaponPickup is one TRUE weapon pickup in a round: the picked-up gun's original_owner differs from the holder who picked it up.

WeaponSpray.description: WeaponSpray holds a weapon's match spray accuracy: count of 3+ shot sprays fired and the share of those bullets that landed.

WeaponStat.description: WeaponStat is a player's kill/damage breakdown for a single weapon.
